prompt:
Subject: seaside portrait facing a typhoon vortex / storm cinematic portrait

Person/Expression: young woman, wet black long hair, bangs and hair ends blowing significantly in the wind, clear skin, natural glossy Japanese-style makeup, looking straight at the camera, a dignified expression with strong will

Clothing/Pose: white camisole top, black mini skirt, white chunky sneakers, white socks, holding a small white dog firmly with one arm, stretching the other hand far towards the camera, a dynamic pose with one leg stepped boldly forward, light fabric movement caught in the wind

Background/Light: Rough seaside rocky area, a huge typhoon vortex spreading across the sky, heavy torrential rain, splashing water, small debris dancing in the strong wind, cold light shining through dark clouds, atmosphere filled with the tension of the storm

Composition/Camera: Ultra low angle, wide-angle lens, exaggerated perspective showing the forward sneaker as large, vertical composition with the subject centered, stretched hand and front leg creating strong depth, dynamic composition like a scene from a movie, immersive photographic expression

Texture/Style: High definition, 4K quality, natural skin texture visible down to pores and grain, texture of wet hair and skin, detailed depiction of water drops and raindrops, natural and realistic dog fur, cinematic lighting, cold blue-gray tones, powerful and realistic AI portrait

Negative: Low quality, unnatural face, unnatural hands, extra fingers, missing fingers, distorted fingers, weird eye lines, asymmetrical eyes, broken face, distorted body, unnatural legs, ruined clothes, excessive exposure, excessive processing, excessive skin correction, unnatural textures typical of AI, unnatural dog, text, logo, watermark
